touches.ai_summary: Sent LinkedIn connection request with brief intro about onboarding automation solutions. No response received.

Cold email introducing AskElephant's onboarding automation capabilities for professional services firms. Morgan responded expressing initial interest and mentioned they're currently evaluating solutions.

questions_asked.question: Do you work with companies our size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have several professional services clients in the 20-50 employee range using our onboarding automation features.

next_steps: Schedule brief call to discuss current onboarding challenges

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with case study from similar professional services firm. Morgan replied asking about implementation timeline and mentioned they're also looking at Fathom.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for onboarding automation setup, including team training and workflow customization.

touches.ai_summary: Shared pricing overview and AskElephant vs Fathom comparison. Morgan confirmed availability for discovery call and mentioned urgency around Q2 onboarding volume increases.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Brief discovery call to understand current onboarding pain points. Morgan described manual processes causing delays and errors. Discussed team size and workflow requirements. Call focused on qualifying fit.

questions_asked.question: How many new clients do you onboard monthly?
questions_asked.answer: About 8-12 right now, expecting that to grow significantly in Q2.

questions_asked.question: Can this integrate with our existing project management tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with most major PM platforms. Which one are you using?

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive demo of onboarding automation features including workflow templates, client portal, and reporting. Morgan was engaged and asked detailed questions about customization. Mentioned Fathom demo is scheduled for next week. No other decision-makers joined the call.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the workflow stages to match our process?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, the workflows are fully configurable and you can create templates for different client types.

questions_asked.question: How does reporting work for tracking onboarding metrics?
questions_asked.answer: We provide real-time dashboards showing cycle time, bottlenecks, and client satisfaction scores.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this decision?
questions_asked.answer: I'm driving this - I have budget approval for tools under $5K. Our CEO trusts my judgment on sales tools.

objections.objection: The consulting add-on seems expensive for our size. Do we really need it?

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call covering automations_plus_consulting package at 6 seats. Discussed ROI and implementation support. Morgan expressed concern about price point compared to Fathom and requested discount. Walked through value of consulting hours for custom workflow design.

questions_asked.question: What exactly do the consulting hours cover?
questions_asked.answer: Custom workflow design, team training, integration setup, and ongoing optimization sessions for the first quarter.

questions_asked.question: How did the Fathom demo go?
questions_asked.answer: It was good, but honestly more focused on call recording than full onboarding automation. Your solution seems more complete.

objections.objection: Fathom quoted us about 40% less. Can you match or get closer to their pricing?

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal with 37.8% discount to match budget constraints. Outlined implementation timeline and support package. Morgan acknowledged receipt and said looks much better, will review with team.
next_steps: Morgan to review and provide feedback by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize terms. Morgan confirmed the discounted pricing works and is ready to move forward. Discussed contract terms, payment schedule, and implementation kickoff timeline. Morgan asked about locking in current pricing if they expand seats.

questions_asked.question: If we add more seats in 6 months, can we keep this per-seat rate?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can lock in your current pricing for any additions within the first year.

questions_asked.question: When would you ideally want to start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: As soon as possible - we want this running before our Q2 volume hits in early May.

touches.ai_summary: Sent final contract documents and implementation kickoff schedule. Morgan confirmed receipt and mentioned routing to procurement. Reiterated urgency for Q2 readiness.
next_steps: Implementation kickoff scheduled for next Monday
